- _sisn_createSampleBufferProcessorFunction.cold.1
CStrings:
+ "\t\t%@;\n"
+ "\t\t%@_ProcessorCoordinator;\n"
+ "\t%@ -> %@ "
+ "\t%@ -> %@_ProcessorCoordinator [dir=both];\n"
+ "\t%@ [shape=%@,label=\"%@\",color=black];\n"
+ "\t%@_ProcessorCoordinator [shape=record,label=\"%@\"];\n"
+ "\tlabel=\"%@"
+ "\tranksep=2;nodesep=4;\n"
+ "\tsubgraph cluster_pipeline%d {\n\t\tlabel=\"%@\";\n\t\tstyle=filled;\n"
+ "\t}\n"
+ "\n\t"
+ "\n\t%@ : %@ -> %@"
+ "\n\t%@: %@"
+ "\n\t%@: %d"
+ "\n\tFacedownState = %d"
+ "\n\tInPocketDecision(Consolidated) = %d"
+ "\n\tN/A"
+ "\n\tSBAccidentalActivationMitigationClientSessionState = %ld"
+ "\n\tSuppressionState = %@"
+ "\n\tcumulativeEnergyFiltered = %.2f, threshold = %.2f"
+ "\n    "
+ "\n    %@\n"
+ "\n#include <metal_stdlib>\n\tusing namespace metal;\n\t\n\tstruct VertexIn {\n\t\tfloat2 position [[attribute(0)]];\n\t\tfloat2 texCoord [[attribute(1)]];\n\t};\n\t\n\tstruct VertexOut {\n\t\tfloat4 position [[position]];\n\t\tfloat2 texCoord;\n\t};\n\t\n\t// Vertex shader\n\tvertex VertexOut vertexShader(uint vertexID [[vertex_id]],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t  constant float4 *vertices [[buffer(0)]],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t  constant float3x3 &transform [[buffer(1)]]) {\n\t\tVertexOut out;\n\t\tfloat4 vert = vertices[vertexID];\n\t\t\n\t\tfloat3 transformedPos = transform * float3(vert.xy, 1.0);\n\t\tout.position = float4(transformedPos.xy, 0.0, 1.0);\n\t\tout.texCoord = vert.zw;\n\t\treturn out;\n\t}\n\t\n\tinline bool isIdentityMatrix(float3x3 m) {\n\t\treturn all(m[0] == float3(1.0, 0.0, 0.0)) &&\n\t\tall(m[1] == float3(0.0, 1.0, 0.0)) &&\n\t\tall(m[2] == float3(0.0, 0.0, 1.0));\n\t}\n\t\n\t// Fragment shader for YUV to RGB conversion\n\tfragment float4 fragmentShaderYUV(VertexOut in [[stage_in]],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t  texture2d<float> yTexture [[texture(0)]],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t  texture2d<float> uvTexture [[texture(1)]],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t  constant float3x3 &colorMatrix [[buffer(0)]],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t  constant float3 &colorOffset [[buffer(1)]],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t  sampler textureSampler [[sampler(0)]]) {\n\n\t\tbool isPlanar = ! isIdentityMatrix(colorMatrix);\n\t\tfloat4 color;\n\t\t\n\t\tif ( isPlanar )\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tfloat y = yTexture.sample(textureSampler, in.texCoord).x;\n\t\t\tfloat2 uv = uvTexture.sample(textureSampler, in.texCoord).xy;\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\tfloat3 yCbCr = float3(y, uv);\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\tfloat3 rgb = colorMatrix * (yCbCr - colorOffset);\n\n\t\t\t// Clamp to valid range\n\t\t\tcolor = float4(rgb, 1.0);\n\t\t\t\n\t\t}\n\t\telse\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tcolor = yTexture.sample(textureSampler, in.texCoord);\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn color;\n\t}\n\t"
+ "\n#include <metal_stdlib>\n\tusing namespace metal;\n\t\n\tstruct VertexIn {\n\t\tfloat2 position [[attribute(0)]];\n\t\tfloat2 texCoord [[attribute(1)]];\n\t};\n\t\n\tstruct VertexOut {\n\t\tfloat4 position [[position]];\n\t\tfloat2 texCoord;\n\t};\n\t\n\tvertex VertexOut vertexShader(constant VertexIn *vertices [[buffer(0)]],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t  uint vid [[vertex_id]]) {\n\t\tVertexOut out;\n\t\tout.position = float4(vertices[vid].position, 0.0, 1.0);\n\t\tout.texCoord = vertices[vid].texCoord;\n\t\treturn out;\n\t}\n\t\n\tfragment float4 fragmentShader_pixelTransfer(VertexOut in [[stage_in]],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t texture2d<float> texture [[texture(0)]],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t sampler texSampler [[sampler(0)]]) {\n\t\treturn texture.sample(texSampler, in.texCoord);\n\t}\n\t\n\tfragment float4 fragmentShader_blackFill(VertexOut in [[stage_in]]) {\n\t\treturn float4( 0, 0, 0, 1 );\n\t}\n\t"
+ "\nCommitted at:\n%@\n"
+ "\ndeferredAttachedMediaKeys: %@"
+ "\nwhile performing requests: %@"
+ "  "
+ "    "
+ "      "
+ "        "
+ "          "
+ "    %@\n"
+ "    Tag '%@',%@ type '%@'"
+ "  Capture Settings:\n    %@\n"
+ "  Commit Date/Time: %@\n"
+ "  Intermediates:\n"
+ "  Photo Descriptors:\n"
+ "  Pipeline Parameters:\n    %@\n"
+ "  Previous attempt error code: %d\n"
+ "  Processing Count: %d\n"
+ "  Settings:\n    %@\n"
+ "  ZSL failure: %@\n"
+ " %.3f"
+ " %@,"
+ " %@:%@"
+ " %@:N/A"
+ " %d times in a row"
+ " ("
+ " (Displayed Frames)"
+ " (Not Rendering)"
+ " (SRL disabled)"
+ " (added 180)"
+ " (cid:%d)"
+ " (error count exceeded, further errors will be silent)"
+ " (format: %@)"
+ " (inside crop dims)"
+ " (primary:%d, cid:%d)"
+ " (report slow allocs)"
+ " (using SyncGroup)"
+ " *HARVESTED*"
+ " +%ims %ifps"
+ " ,"
+ " - found"
+ " - new"
+ " -> "
+ " / %@ "
+ " / %@: "
+ " / %@: %d"
+ " : %@"
+ " ; "
+ " Empty"
+ " Mitigated"
+ " NOT"
+ " None"
+ " PortType:%@"
+ " Raw:%d, SIFRRaw:%d"
+ " TextOrientation:1"
+ " [%@: R:%.4f G:%.4f B:%.4f]"
+ " [%d]"
+ " and processing flags: %@"
+ " camera in use by other client"
+ " cameraParameters: {parametersWereReset:%d, modelSpecificName:%@}"
+ " captureType: {current:%@, new:%@}"
+ " constantColorConfidenceMap surface"
+ " constantColorConfidenceMap(surface)"
+ " deferred photo proxy surface"
+ " deferredPhotoFinalDimensions: {current:%dx%d, new:%dx%d}"
+ " deferredPhotoProxy(surface)"
+ " demosaicedRaw: graph reuse disabled"
+ " demosaicedRaw: {current:%d, new:%d}"
+ " depth surface"
+ " depth(surface)"
+ " depthData: {current:%d, new:%d}"
+ " direction(%@)"
+ " enableTelemetry=YES %{signpost.description:end_time}llu"
+ " enhancedResolution: {semanticStyleValuesAreEqual:%d}"
+ " first video "
+ " for %@"
+ " for captureID:%lld"
+ " for classname %@"
+ " format"
+ " glasses-matte surface"
+ " glassesMatte(surface)"
+ " hair-matte surface"
+ " hairMatte(surface)"
+ " images."
+ " in the ISP"
+ " is finished"
+ " mainRawThumbnailBufferTag '%@'"
+ " mainRawThumbnailMetadataTag '%@'"
+ " masterClockType"
+ " masterclock"
+ " pipelineParameters: {%@}"
+ " portType: {current:%@, new:%@}"
+ " portrait-matte surface"
+ " portraitMatte(surface)"
+ " portraitRendering: {current:%d, new:%d}"
+ " pre-bracketed frame and"
+ " preview sbuf"
+ " preview sbuf(data)"
+ " preview sbuf(surface)"
+ " preview surface"
+ " preview(surface)"
+ " rawThumbnailsBufferTag '%@'"
+ " rawThumbnailsMetadataTag '%@'"
+ " sbuf"
+ " sbuf(data)"
+ " sbuf(surface)"
+ " sifrRawThumbnailBufferTag '%@'"
+ " sifrRawThumbnailMetadataTag '%@'"
+ " skin-matte surface"
+ " skinMatte(surface)"
+ " smartStyle:\"%@\""
+ " sourceNodeOutputDimensions: {current:%@, new:%@}"
+ " speedOverQuality:1"
+ " stereoPhoto: {currentPopcount:%d, newPopcount:%d}"
+ " surface"
+ " teeth-matte surface"
+ " teethMatte(surface)"
+ " thumb(surface)"
+ " thumbnail surface"
+ " ultraHighResolutionCapture: graph reuse disabled"
+ " }"
+ "! ( clientStartRunning && clientStopRunning )"
+ "! CGRectIsNull( trackedRect )"
+ "! __os_warn_unused(__builtin_add_overflow((capacity), (4096 - 1), (&adjustedCapacity)))"
+ "! __os_warn_unused(__builtin_add_overflow((roundedCapacity), (overhead), (&totalAllocationSize)))"
+ "! _clientStartedSession"
+ "! _structuredLightAFAssistStreamControlledByAnotherClient"
+ "! _synchronizedStreamsGroup"
+ "! didOverflow"
+ "! err"
+ "! inferenceDependencyAlreadyMarkedComplete"
+ "! regexError"
+ "! storage->isBusy"
+ "! storage->isRecoveryRequired"
+ "! vccIsBusy"
+ "! vcc_symlinkExists( sVCCPreallocationSaveToSymlinkCString )"
